miracleEvent.pages.INITIAL.description:
A door appears from the void. Beyond it lies no room — only a slow river of [purple]starlight[/purple], and a whisper that belongs to no age:

"Believer — the Miracle is [gold]generous[/gold], and [red]greedy[/red]. [gold]Offer[/gold] to it, or [gold]take[/gold] from it; but every bargain leaves an echo upon the world."

Four halos kindle before you, each pointing to a desire.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.description:
A door appears from the void. Beyond it lies no room — only a slow river of [purple]starlight[/purple], and a whisper that belongs to no age:

"Believer — the Miracle is [gold]generous[/gold], and [red]greedy[/red]. [gold]Offer[/gold] to it, or [gold]take[/gold] from it; but every bargain leaves an echo upon the world."

Four halos kindle before you, each pointing to a desire.
miracleEvent.pages.FORGE_ROOT.descriptio: The forge-light pulses in your palm. [gold]Offer[/gold] gold for it, or [gold]take[/gold] it — at the cost of steeper prices to come?
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.FORGE_ROOT.descripti: The forge-light pulses in your palm. [gold]Offer[/gold] gold for it, or [gold]take[/gold] it — at the cost of steeper prices to come?
miracleEvent.pages.FORGE_SACRIFICE.descr: Cast gold into the light, and it congeals into forges.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.FORGE_SACRIFICE.desc: Cast gold into the light, and it congeals into forges.
miracleEvent.pages.FORGE_SACRIFICE.resol: Forges take shape in your hands.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.FORGE_SACRIFICE.reso: Forges take shape in your hands.
miracleEvent.pages.FORGE_TAKE.descriptio: The Miracle hands you forges freely — and quietly raises the price of things to come.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.FORGE_TAKE.descripti: The Miracle hands you forges freely — and quietly raises the price of things to come.
miracleEvent.pages.FORGE_TAKE.resolution: The forges are yours; the cost is on the ledger.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.FORGE_TAKE.resolutio: The forges are yours; the cost is on the ledger.
miracleEvent.pages.GOLD_ROOT.description: Gold-light swirls beyond the door. [gold]Offer[/gold] wealth, or [gold]take[/gold] it?
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GOLD_ROOT.descriptio: Gold-light swirls beyond the door. [gold]Offer[/gold] wealth, or [gold]take[/gold] it?
miracleEvent.pages.GOLD_SACRIFICE.descri: You offer gold, and the Miracle lowers the forge's price.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GOLD_SACRIFICE.descr: You offer gold, and the Miracle lowers the forge's price.
miracleEvent.pages.GOLD_SACRIFICE.resolu: Gold returns to the river; the price falls with it.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GOLD_SACRIFICE.resol: Gold returns to the river; the price falls with it.
miracleEvent.pages.GOLD_TAKE.description: The Miracle yields gold — and lifts the forge's price.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GOLD_TAKE.descriptio: The Miracle yields gold — and lifts the forge's price.
miracleEvent.pages.GOLD_TAKE.resolution: Gold falls into your purse; the cost is on the ledger.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GOLD_TAKE.resolution: Gold falls into your purse; the cost is on the ledger.
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_ROOT.description: Cards of fate flutter in the light. [gold]Offer[/gold] a card, or [gold]take[/gold] a new possibility?
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_ROOT.descriptio: Cards of fate flutter in the light. [gold]Offer[/gold] a card, or [gold]take[/gold] a new possibility?
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_ROOT.options.TAK: Spend [gold]gold[/gold] to pick a card from a [gold]pack[/gold].
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_ROOT.options.TA: Spend [gold]gold[/gold] to pick a card from a [gold]pack[/gold].
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_SACRIFICE.descri: Cast a card of the matching rarity into the light; it melts into gold.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_SACRIFICE.descr: Cast a card of the matching rarity into the light; it melts into gold.
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_SACRIFICE.resolu: That card is erased from your fate.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_SACRIFICE.resol: That card is erased from your fate.
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_TAKE.description: Spend gold to open a pack — claim all 3 cards of the matching rarity inside.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_TAKE.descriptio: Spend gold to open a pack — claim all 3 cards of the matching rarity inside.
miracleEvent.pages.CARD_TAKE.resolution: The pack bursts open; three new cards join your deck.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.CARD_TAKE.resolution: The pack bursts open; three new cards join your deck.
miracleEvent.pages.GIFT_ROOT.description: An ornate gift box hovers in silence. [gold]Offer[/gold] gold to open it, or [gold]take[/gold] a safe handful of gold?
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GIFT_ROOT.descriptio: An ornate gift box hovers in silence. [gold]Offer[/gold] gold to open it, or [gold]take[/gold] a safe handful of gold?
miracleEvent.pages.GIFT_ROOT.options.SAC: Spend [gold]gold[/gold] to draw from the box.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GIFT_ROOT.options.SA: Spend [gold]gold[/gold] to draw from the box.
miracleEvent.pages.GIFT_SACRIFICE.descri: Unpredictable fate churns inside. Draws = tier. Pool: [blue]10%[/blue] forge / [blue]10%[/blue] forge price [green]-25[/green] / [blue]10%[/blue] remove a card / [blue]70%[/blue] gold.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GIFT_SACRIFICE.descr: Unpredictable fate churns inside. Draws = tier. Pool: [blue]10%[/blue] forge / [blue]10%[/blue] forge price [green]-25[/green] / [blue]10%[/blue] remove a card / [blue]70%[/blue] gold.
miracleEvent.pages.GIFT_SACRIFICE.resolu: The box reveals all its gifts.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GIFT_SACRIFICE.resol: The box reveals all its gifts.
miracleEvent.pages.GIFT_TAKE.resolution: Unwilling to gamble, you take [green]50[/green] gold.
MIRACLE_EVENT.pages.GIFT_TAKE.resolution: Unwilling to gamble, you take [green]50[/green] gold.
